result.markdown: --- title: "Week 4: Simple forecasting methods" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Forecasting workflow * Four benchmark forecasting methods that we will use for comparison * Linear trends, dummy seasonality * Forecasting with transformations * Forecasting with decompositions ## Pre-class activities * Read [Chapter 5 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/toolbox.html), Sections 5.1 -- 5.3, 5.6 -- 5.7, and watch all embedded videos * Read [Chapter 7.4 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/useful-predictors.html), and watch the embedded video ## Monday lecture Download slides ## Tuesday workshop * [Week 4 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049181) ## Exercises (on your own or in tutorial) * Complete Exercises 1-5, 11 from [Section 5.11 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/toolbox-exercises.html). * Complete Exercises 2 and 6 from [Section 7.10 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/regression-exercises.html). ## Assignments * [Assignment 1](../assignments/A1.qmd) is due on Monday 24 August.
